name: Sheresh Dome Road
feel: Movement is disciplined and survival-first, with route declarations, shelter expectations, and whiteout etiquette structuring every crossing.
paperwork_and_permission_model: Travel along Sheresh Dome Road is easiest when intentions, cargo, and patronage are legible before questions begin.
patrol_rhythm: Daylight oversight is visible and procedural; night oversight is thinner, more suspicious, and less forgiving.
after_dark_change: After sunset, traffic thins, trust narrows, and informal power brokers matter more than posted rules.
